TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Mama, title = Mama, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Mama} }

S.FORM: Ina o miliput ko wawa!midemak aca to tatayalen no loma' ato matayal i papotal.
S.PHON: ina o~u miɾipo~u~ut ko~u wawa!miɬ~ɮəmak aʦa to~u tatajaɾən no~u ɾo~umaʡ ato~u matajaɾ i papo~utaɾ.
S.FORM: Ina o miliput ko wawa!midemak aca to tatayalen no loma' ato matayal i papotal.
S.PHON: ina o~u miɾipo~u~ut ko~u wawa!miɬ~ɮəmak aʦa to~u tatajaɾən no~u ɾo~umaʡ ato~u matajaɾ i papo~utaɾ.
